blog_title: 240 GSM T-Shirt Feels Cheap? Yarn Quality vs GSM — Why Same Weight Fabric Differs in Bulk Orders
caption:
Both 240 GSM. One felt premium. One felt cheap. 😬

Why? GSM is just weight. Yarn quality changes everything. Combed ring-spun cotton = smooth. Carded yarn = rough. Dark colors like royal blue expose cheap dyes instantly.

Flip the tee inside-out. Check for bio-wash. His cheap one skipped both.

Save this if you're sourcing your next 500+ piece order 👇
